services.title: VIP Transfer
services.subtitle: Premium transfer experience for Antalya airport and surroundings

card1.title: Airport Transfer
card1.desc: Seamless pickup with our luxury Mercedes Vito vehicles. We track your flight status and wait during delays.

card2.title: Private City Tours
card2.desc: Explore Antalya and surroundings at your own pace. See hidden gems with our local drivers.

card3.title: VIP Transfer
card3.desc: Design perfect comfort with routes tailored to your personal needs. Entertainment or vacation-focused VIP travel.

card4.title: Intercity Transfer
card4.desc: From Antalya to any city you wish, stress-free and comfortable long journey experience with our luxury vehicles.

regions.title: Service
regions.desc: Professional and comfortable transportation to holiday resorts throughout Antalya.

feat1.title: Trust & Quality

pricing.title: Transfer
pricing.subtitle: One way, per vehicle — fixed price regardless of number of passengers
pricing.note: Prices are per vehicle. No price change for night transfers (00:00–06:00) or extra luggage. Get a price via WhatsApp for regions not on the list.

section1.title: 1. Introduction
section1.body: {name} is committed to protecting the privacy of your personal data. This policy explains how data collected while using our services is processed.

section3.title: 3. Use of Data
section3.body: Collected data is used solely for booking operations, customer support, and improving service quality. Your data is not shared with third parties.

section4.title: 4. Data Security
section4.body: Your data is stored in encrypted form on secure servers. Industry-standard security measures are applied against unauthorized access.

section5.title: 5. Contact
section5.body: For requests regarding your personal data, please contact us:
